raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "daemon self-check loop", "issue": "Self-check every 30min may create noise if task creation isn't idempotent or deduped. Risk of task storm if recovery fails silently. No backoff or rate-limiting defined.", "recommended_fix": "Add exponential backoff, task deduplication by type, and cap max retries. Log escalation path to governance_events."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "safe executors", "issue": "rebuild_code_index and run_tests could strain I/O under load. No concurrency guard or resource limit.", "recommended_fix": "Wrap in semaphore with max 2 concurrent, check system load before launch."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "prod health curl removal", "issue": "Redundant monitoring removed, but self-check should verify GH Actions status, not assume.", "recommended_fix": "Add GH Actions status check in local_health."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Self-check every 30min may create noise if task creation isn't idempotent or deduped. Risk of task storm if recovery fails silently. No backoff or rate-limiting defined.
findings.recommended_fix: Add exponential backoff, task deduplication by type, and cap max retries. Log escalation path to governance_events.

findings.issue: rebuild_code_index and run_tests could strain I/O under load. No concurrency guard or resource limit.
findings.recommended_fix: Wrap in semaphore with max 2 concurrent, check system load before launch.

findings.issue: Redundant monitoring removed, but self-check should verify GH Actions status, not assume.
findings.recommended_fix: Add GH Actions status check in local_health.
